summary: Executed requested both-scope validation for P0 #4 using available workspace/runtime: migration/static contracts, lint/TypeScript/export, and live UI smoke. Static checks passed (18/18), but authenticated live flows are blocked because all provided test credentials return 401 from Supabase Auth, and remote SQL race/grant checks requiring Session pooler were not executable in this environment context.

critical.issue: All three documented test accounts failed login with HTTP 401, blocking authenticated verification of RPC create_appointment, reschedule flow, and role-protected behavior.

Could not confirm remote privilege state for 'authenticated sem INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE direto' via Session pooler SQL in this run; local migration 20260716057000 explicitly revokes INSERT only, while UPDATE/DELETE revocations are not present in this file.

ui_bugs.issue: Credential matrix (client/professional/admin) consistently shows 'Não foi possível entrar...' due upstream 401, so post-login role dashboards and booking/reagendamento paths were not reachable in live mode.

integration_issues.issue: Code wiring uses requested_service_id: null instead of forwarding a selected/actual service id; this may diverge from strict remote contract expectations for reschedule_appointment parameterization.

action_items: Validate/rotate and re-provision active QA credentials in Supabase Auth, then rerun multi-role live tests.

Run remote SQL verification through Session pooler for: duration_minutes/ends_at integrity, active-only overlap constraint behavior, create_appointment race (expect 1 success + 1 error 23P01), and get_public_busy_slots contract.
Re-confirm that authenticated has no direct INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE on appointments in remote grants (not only RLS path).
Review reschedule payload in admin/professional screens to send requested_service_id according to remote contract expectations.
critical_code_review_comments: Static contract checks passed: migration defines duration snapshot trigger, ends_at backfill/checks, overlap exclusion constraint scoped to pending/confirmed + deleted_at IS NULL, and create_appointment maps exclusion_violation to 23P01 appointment_conflict.
RPC-only creation wiring is present across reviewed screens (public, legacy, admin, professional) with no direct appointments INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE in current frontend code scan.

Local migration text does not explicitly revoke UPDATE/DELETE on appointments for authenticated; if remote default grants allow these, requirement 'sem INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE direto' may be only partially enforced unless separately revoked elsewhere.

success_rate.backend: 80% (static/regression pass, live remote DB verification blocked)
success_rate.frontend: 45% (runtime load + unauthenticated smoke pass, authenticated/integration flows blocked by auth 401)

test_credentials: Read from /app/memory/test_credentials.md and used exactly as documented; all returned 401 on Supabase password grant during live UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Do not assume previous auth credentials are valid. First verify Supabase auth login for all three roles; once restored, execute live booking+reschedule flows and run Session-pooler SQL matrix for race/grants/constraint checks. Keep DB clean (no residual fixtures).
rca of the issue: Primary blocker in this run was authentication failure, not UI selector instability: Supabase auth password endpoint returned 401 for all documented QA users, reproducing consistent login denial and preventing entry into role-protected flows. Secondary verification gap: remote SQL checks requiring Session pooler connection were not runnable from available environment context in this run, so concurrency and grant assertions could not be re-proven live.
